---
title: "03a_proteomics_differential"
author: "alexander-gysin (alexander.gysin@usz.ch)"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

# Setup and import

```{r setup_import, echo=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(limma)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(msigdbr)
library(patchwork)
library(here)
library(kableExtra)

# Knitr Config
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

# Output paths
current_file <- "03a_proteomics_differential"
output_dir_data <- here::here("output", current_file)
if (!dir.exists(output_dir_data)) dir.create(output_dir_data, recursive = TRUE)

# Source Configuration & Engines
source(here::here("code", "00_config.R"))
source(here::here("code", "00_omics_engines.R"))

# Load Pre-Cleaned Data from Script 01
master_spine <- readRDS(here::here("output", "01_data_import_and_qc", "clinical_spine.rds"))
omics_mat <- readRDS(here::here("output", "01_data_import_and_qc", "clean_olink_matrix.rds"))

# Fetch GO Biological Processes Database for GSEA
go_genesets <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C5", subcategory = "BP") %>% select(gs_name, gene_symbol)
```

# Analysis Configurator
```{r analysis_config}
# 1. Global Mathematical Thresholds
omics_config <- list(
  gsea_p_cutoff  = 0.20, 
  gsea_min_size  = 3     
)

# 2. PCA Master Layouts (Independent grids)
pca_configs <- list(
  pca_global = list(
    title = "PCA: Global Cohort Structure",
    subset_to_contrast = NULL, 
    color_vars = c("cohort_group", "Sex", "Age", "Sample_Age") 
  ),
  pca_active = list(
    title = "PCA: Active vs Controls",
    subset_to_contrast = list(group_col = "cohort_group", target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE, GRP_CONTROL)),
    color_vars = c("cohort_group", "Sex", "Age", "Sample_Age")
  ),
  pca_nonactive = list(
    title = "PCA: Nonactive vs Controls",
    subset_to_contrast = list(group_col = "cohort_group", target_groups = c(GRP_NON_ACTIVE, GRP_CONTROL)),
    color_vars = c("cohort_group", "Sex", "Age", "Sample_Age")
  )
)

# 3. Differential Expression Contrasts (Target vs Reference)
contrast_configs <- list(
  active_vs_control = list(
    title = "Active vs Control",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE),
    ref_groups = c(GRP_CONTROL),
    is_continuous = FALSE,
    covariates = c("Age", "Sex"),
    dea_p_cutoff = 0.05,  # <-- INDIVIDUAL CUTOFFS
    dea_fc_cutoff = 0.5
  ),
  nonactive_vs_control = list(
    title = "Nonactive vs Control",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_NON_ACTIVE),
    ref_groups = c(GRP_CONTROL),
    is_continuous = FALSE,
    covariates = c("Age", "Sex"),
    dea_p_cutoff = 0.05,
    dea_fc_cutoff = 0.5
  ),
  active_vs_nonactive = list(
    title = "Active vs Nonactive",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE),
    ref_groups = c(GRP_NON_ACTIVE),
    is_continuous = FALSE,
    covariates = c("Age", "Sex"),
    dea_p_cutoff = 0.05,
    dea_fc_cutoff = 0.2
  ),
  active_vs_nonactive_uncorrected = list(
    title = "Active vs Nonactive (Uncorrected)",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE),
    ref_groups = c(GRP_NON_ACTIVE),
    is_continuous = FALSE,
    covariates = c(),
    dea_p_cutoff = 0.05,
    dea_fc_cutoff = 0.2
  ),
  active_vs_nonactive_sample_age_corr = list(
    title = "Active vs Nonactive (Sample Age Corrected)",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE),
    ref_groups = c(GRP_NON_ACTIVE),
    is_continuous = FALSE,
    covariates = c("Age", "Sex", "Sample_Age"), 
    dea_p_cutoff = 0.05,
    dea_fc_cutoff = 0.5
  )
)

## 4. Cross-Contrast Trajectory Plots
cross_contrasts <- list(
  active_vs_nonactive_trajectory = list(
    title = "Trajectory: Active vs Nonactive",
    x_axis_contrast = "active_vs_control",      
    y_axis_contrast = "nonactive_vs_control",   
    top_n_specific  = 5,  
    top_n_shared    = 5,
    top_n_pathways  = 10,       # Per Quadrant
    pathway_rank_var = "rank_score" # Internal rank score uses lowest FDR sum
  )
)

# 5. Heatmap Configuration
heatmap_config <- list(
  top_n = 30,
  split_by_group = FALSE, 
  row_font_size = 8
)

# 6. Comparative Settings
cross_contrasts$active_vs_nonactive_trajectory$top_n_upset <- 10      
cross_contrasts$active_vs_nonactive_trajectory$top_n_pathways <- 20   

# 7. LASSO Feature Selection
lasso_configs <- list(
  active_vs_nonactive = list(
    title = "Predictors: Active vs Nonactive",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE, GRP_NON_ACTIVE)
  )
)

cat("Pipelines and Mathematical Engines fully configured.\n")
```

# Execution Engines
## PCA
```{r execution_engine_PCA, fig.width=8, fig.height=8}
cat("### Executing Principal Component Analysis...\n\n")

# Process each PCA configuration through the Master Pipeline
for (pca_name in names(pca_configs)) {
  
  cat(sprintf("#### Processing: %s\n", pca_configs[[pca_name]]$title))
  
  # CALL THE MASTER PIPELINE
  # This handles filtering, directory creation, plotting, and saving automatically
  pca_results <- wrap_pca_pipeline(
    omics_mat           = omics_mat, 
    clin_df             = master_spine, 
    pca_conf            = pca_configs[[pca_name]], 
    pca_id              = pca_name, 
    base_output_dir     = output_dir_data, 
    project_colors_func = get_project_colors
  )
  
  # PRINT TO HTML REPORT
  # We print the core plots and the merged grids
  print(pca_results[["scree"]])
  cat("\n\n")
  print(pca_results[["loadings"]])
  cat("\n\n")
  print(pca_results[["merged_drivers"]])
  cat("\n\n")
  
  if (!is.null(pca_results[["merged_overlays"]])) {
    print(pca_results[["merged_overlays"]])
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  cat("--- \n\n")
}
```

## Differential Expression Analysis & GSEA
```{r execution_engine_DEA_GSEA, fig.width=8,fig.height=8}
cat("### Executing Differential Expression & Contrast-Specific Discovery...\n\n")

master_dea_results <- list()
master_gsea_results <- list() 

for (c_name in names(contrast_configs)) {
  
  # Run Master Pipeline
  res <- wrap_dea_pipeline(
    omics_mat           = omics_mat, 
    clin_df             = master_spine, 
    dea_conf            = contrast_configs[[c_name]], 
    dea_id              = c_name, 
    base_output_dir     = output_dir_data, 
    go_db               = go_genesets, 
    omics_config        = omics_config, 
    heatmap_config      = heatmap_config, 
    project_colors_func = get_project_colors
  )
  
  # Report Status
  cat(sprintf("#### Contrast: %s\n", contrast_configs[[c_name]]$title))
  cat(sprintf("*Diagnostic: Samples used: %d Target, %d Reference*\n\n", 
              res$diagnostics$n_target, res$diagnostics$n_ref))
  
  if(res$status == "failed") {
    cat(sprintf("<span style='color:red;'>**SKIPPED:** %s</span>\n\n", res$error_msg))
    next
  }
  
  master_dea_results[[c_name]] <- res$data$dea
  master_gsea_results[[c_name]] <- res$data$gsea

  # Rendering
  print(res$plots$volcano); cat("\n\n")
  
  if(nrow(res$tables$significant_proteins) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("##### Significant Proteins (%d total)\n\n", nrow(res$tables$significant_proteins)))
    print(kbl(res$tables$significant_proteins, format = "html", digits = 4, align = "c", 
              caption = sprintf("Significant Results: %s", contrast_configs[[c_name]]$title)) %>%
          kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE, position = "left"))
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  draw(res$plots$heatmap); cat("\n\n")

  if(!is.null(res$plots$gsea_dotplot)) print(res$plots$gsea_dotplot); cat("\n\n")
  if(!is.null(res$plots$gsea_ridge)) print(res$plots$gsea_ridge); cat("\n\n")
  
  if(!is.null(res$plots$lasso_weights)) {
    plot(res$plots$lasso_cv); title(main = sprintf("%s: LASSO Tuning", contrast_configs[[c_name]]$title), line = 2.5)
    cat("\n\n")
    print(res$plots$lasso_weights); cat("\n\n")
  }
  
  cat("--- \n\n")
}
```

## Trajectory Mapping
```{r execution_engine_trajectory, fig.width=8, fig.height=8}
cat("### Executing Comparative Analysis (Trajectories)...\n\n")

for (cross_name in names(cross_contrasts)) {
  conf <- cross_contrasts[[cross_name]]
  
  # CALL THE MASTER PIPELINE
  # FIX: Added 'omics_config' to the arguments below
  traj_res <- wrap_trajectory_pipeline(
    cross_conf          = conf, 
    cross_id            = cross_name, 
    master_dea          = master_dea_results, 
    master_gsea         = master_gsea_results, 
    contrast_configs    = contrast_configs,
    base_output_dir     = output_dir_data, 
    project_colors_func = get_project_colors, 
    highlight_color     = COLOR_HIGHLIGHT,
    omics_config        = omics_config      # <--- ADD THIS LINE
  )
  
  cat(sprintf("#### Comparison: %s\n", conf$title))
  
  if(traj_res$status == "failed") {
    cat(sprintf("<span style='color:red;'>**SKIPPED:** %s</span>\n\n", traj_res$error_msg))
    next
  }

  # Inline HTML Rendering
  if(!is.null(traj_res$plots$protein_trajectory)) {
    print(traj_res$plots$protein_trajectory); cat("\n\n")
  }
  
  if(!is.null(traj_res$plots$venn)) {
    cat("##### Feature Intersection (Venn Diagram)\n")
    print(traj_res$plots$venn); cat("\n\n")
  }

  if(!is.null(traj_res$plots$pathway_trajectory)) {
    cat("##### Pathway Trajectory\n")
    print(traj_res$plots$pathway_trajectory); cat("\n\n")
  }
  
  cat("--- \n\n")
}
```

# Appendix
```{r print_engine, code=readLines(here::here("code", "00_omics_engines.R")), eval=FALSE}

```
